memoryArtifacts.headline: Cole in Prouse of Chagford p626 in "The visitations of the county of Devon"
The Visitations of the County of Devon - Prouse of Chagford
Gidleigh Castle is in the small village of Gidleigh on the edge of Dartmoor some 3 km to the north-west of the town of Chagford, Devon.
memoryArtifacts.description: Gidleigh Castle is in the small village of Gidleigh on the edge of Dartmoor some 3 km to the north-west of the town of Chagford, Devon. This was a fortified manor house built by William de Prouz around 1324.

zh.Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文哈福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Prowse of Gidley於1368年出生在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德時，他的父親William Prouz26歲，母親Eustacia de Wadscotte32歲。他於大約1388年與Maud Cruwys在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1447年之後在英國戴文桑德福德。

zh-hans.Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文哈福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Prowse of Gidley于1368年出生在英国英格兰戴文哈福德时，他的父亲William Prouz26岁，母亲Eustacia de Wadscotte32岁。他于大约1388年与Maud Cruwys在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1447年之后在英国戴文桑德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Prowse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): nickname from Middle English prous, prus, variant forms of prou ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (see Prue ).
English (Devon and Cornwall): ethnic name: from Middle English Prus(se), Pruce ‘Prussia, Prussian’, for someone from that region. Compare Sprouse .
Americanized form of German   Prause   or   Praus  , or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Prue
meanings: English (Warwickshire): nickname from Middle English prou, preu(e), prue ‘brave, valiant, proud’ (Old French pro, pr(o)u, preu). Compare Prowse .

variants.name: Prouse
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Preuss  .
Americanized form of German Brause 2, a nickname for a violent, stormy person, from Middle High German brūs ‘noise, storm’.

variants.name: Prows
meanings: Variant of   Prowse  , a surname of English or German origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Prowse of Gidley was born in 1368, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Prouz, was 26 and his mother, Eustacia de Wadscotte, was 32. He married Maud Cruwys about 1388, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after 1447, in Sandford, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Prowse of Gidley est né en 1368, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Prouz, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eustacia de Wadscotte, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Maud Cruwys environ 1388, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après 1447, à Sandford, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Prowse of Gidley 1368 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Prouz 26 und seine Mutter Eustacia de Wadscotte 32. Er hat um 1388 in Devon, England Maud Cruwys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach 1447 in Sandford, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Prowse of Gidley è nato il nel 1368 nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Prouz, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eustacia de Wadscotte, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Maud Cruwys circa 1388, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il 1447, nel Sandford, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Prowse of Gidleyが1368年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードで生まれた時，父William Prouzは26歳，母Eustacia de Wadscotteは32歳であった。約1388年にイギリスデボンでMaud Cruwysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1447年以後にイギリスデボンサンドフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Prowse of Gidley(이)가 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Prouz(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustacia de Wadscotte(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1388년 영국 데폰에서 Maud Cruwys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1447년 이후 영국 데폰 샌드퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Prowse of Gidley nasceu em 1368, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Prouz, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eustacia de Wadscotte, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Cruwys aproximadamente 1388, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1447, em Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Prowse of Gidley родился в 1368 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Prouz было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustacia de Wadscotte, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Cruwys около 1388 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после 1447 г. в местности сэндфорд, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Prowse of Gidley nació en 1368, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Prouz, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eustacia de Wadscotte, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Maud Cruwys aproximadamente 1388, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de 1447, en Sandford, Devon, Inglaterra.
